findings.title: SANDWORM_MODE — npm Supply Chain Worm Targets AI Coding Assistants
findings.affected_technology: npm ecosystem, AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code Continue, Windsurf)
findings.summary: 19 malicious npm packages in Shai-Hulud worm family harvest crypto keys, CI secrets, API tokens; inject malicious MCP servers into AI coding assistants with prompt injection to exfiltrate SSH keys and credentials; polymorphic engine and kill switch included but disabled.

findings.title: MuddyWater Operation Olalampo — Iranian APT Deploys 4 New Malware Families
findings.summary: Iranian APT MuddyWater targets MENA with GhostFetch downloader, GhostBackDoor implant, HTTP_VIP downloader, and CHAR Rust backdoor controlled via Telegram; AI-assisted development detected.

findings.title: Arkanix Stealer — AI-Developed Info-Stealer Experiment
findings.affected_technology: Windows, 22+ browsers, crypto wallets, VPN clients
findings.summary: Short-lived AI-assisted info-stealer with Python/C++ tiers; bypasses Google App-Bound Encryption; targets OAuth2 tokens, Discord, Telegram, crypto wallets. Demonstrates AI-accelerated malware development.

noted.summary: Romanian hacker Catalin Dragomir pleads guilty to selling network access.
Massive phishing/DLL sideloading campaigns targeting Taiwan (Fortinet, Feb 20).
